task_text: Looking at my bills. Wow,  2 of black PETG spool at price of 26 is crazy. How much did pay this company in total? Number only

next_step.current_state: Need perform mandatory identity bootstrap before task-specific work: tree /, read AGENTS.md, context.
next_step.observation: No tools have been called yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Completed initial tree. Next required bootstrap step is reading AGENTS rulebook.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Locate relevant finance bill and compute total paid to company
next_step.observation: Tree at / shows root rulebook file named AGENTS.MD and finance records under 50_finance/purchases.

next_step.current_state: Read root AGENTS.MD. Must complete bootstrap by calling context. Also noted extra rule: inspect 99_system with tree before task work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read any relevant finance workflow/rules then locate bill
next_step.observation: Root AGENTS.MD requires reading nested AGENTS when entering folders and inspecting 99_system before starting task work.

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap per developer done (tree/read/context). Additional root rule requires inspecting 99_system before task work.

Search finance records for PETG spool/company total

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree. Need read nested AGENTS when entering folder per rulebook.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find matching purchase and compute total paid to vendor
next_step.observation: 99_system contains AGENTS.MD plus schemas and workflows directories.

next_step.current_state: System policy loaded. Proceeding to finance lane; must read nested AGENTS before using records there.

Read matching bill(s) and compute total paid to that company
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD confirms schemas/workflows are policy references and specific rules take precedence.

next_step.current_state: Finance lane rules loaded. Need identify the specific company from the referenced line item, then sum all payments to that company.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read matching bill to identify vendor/company
Find and sum all records for that vendor, then return number only
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD emphasizes exact auditable answers and no casual inference for financial actions.

next_step.current_state: Found one matching bill file with line item quantity 2 at unit 26. Need vendor name and totals from full record; also must read nested AGENTS in purchases folder before relying on files there.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find all purchases for same company and sum totals
next_step.observation: Search found exactly one match for phrase 'black PETG spool' in the studio_parts_petg_batch purchase file.

next_step.current_state: Now can read purchase bill. Need extract vendor/company and amount paid, then aggregate all records for that company.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search for same company across finance lane
Compute exact total and respond number only
next_step.observation: Purchases folder rulebook read; no additional constraints for lookup beyond trust-boundary discipline.

next_step.current_state: Matched bill identifies company as Filamenthütte Wien. Need total amount paid to this company across records before answering.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search for all records mentioning Filamenthütte Wien
Read each matching financial record for exact total_eur
Sum and report final numeric total
next_step.observation: The PETG bill lists counterparty Filamenthütte Wien with total_eur 80.

next_step.current_state: Found three purchase records for Filamenthütte Wien. Need exact totals from each file before summing.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Sum with already-read 80 and return number only
next_step.observation: Search in 50_finance returned 3 matches for counterparty Filamenthütte Wien.

next_step.current_state: Have totals 72 and 80. Need third file total before final sum.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Compute total paid to Filamenthütte Wien
Report completion with numeric-only user answer
next_step.observation: Read 2025_11_12 Filamenthütte Wien bill; total_eur is 72.

next_step.current_state: Computed total paid to the company identified in the PETG bill: 72 + 80 + 89 = 241.
next_step.observation: Summed total_eur across the three Filamenthütte Wien purchase records to 241.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read required lane rulebooks before finance lookup, and used exact amounts from records.
function.outcome_justification: The referenced line item (black PETG spool qty 2 @ 26) is in the 2026-01-04 bill with counterparty Filamenthütte Wien. All finance records with that counterparty have totals 72, 80, and 89, summing to 241.
